'''zofadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoarfrosted|hoarfrosted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoarfrosted|hoarfrosted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zofadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofadhithi|zofadhithi]] || [[word:zofadhiji|zofadhiji]] || [[word:zofadhishi|zofadhishi]] || [[word:zofadhiki|zofadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofadhuthuthu|zofadhuthuthu]] || [[word:zofadhujuju|zofadhujuju]] || [[word:zofadhushushu|zofadhushushu]] || [[word:zofadhukuku|zofadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofadhuthu|zofadhuthu]] || [[word:zofadhuju|zofadhuju]] || [[word:zofadhushu|zofadhushu]] || [[word:zofadhuku|zofadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofadhufthuf|zofadhufthuf]] || [[word:zofadhufjuf|zofadhufjuf]] || [[word:zofadhufshuf|zofadhufshuf]] || [[word:zofadhufkuf|zofadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofadhethe|zofadhethe]] || [[word:zofadheje|zofadheje]] || [[word:zofadheshe|zofadheshe]] || [[word:zofadheke|zofadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofadhothotho|zofadhothotho]] || [[word:zofadhojojo|zofadhojojo]] || [[word:zofadhoshosho|zofadhoshosho]] || [[word:zofadhokoko|zofadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofadhotho|zofadhotho]] || [[word:zofadhojo|zofadhojo]] || [[word:zofadhosho|zofadhosho]] || [[word:zofadhoko|zofadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofadhofthof|zofadhofthof]] || [[word:zofadhofjof|zofadhofjof]] || [[word:zofadhofshof|zofadhofshof]] || [[word:zofadhofkof|zofadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofadhïfthïf|zofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfjïf|zofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfshïf|zofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfkïf|zofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofadhïfthïfthïf|zofadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfjïfjïf|zofadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfshïfshïf|zofadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfkïfkïf|zofadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofadhïfthïf|zofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfjïf|zofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfshïf|zofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfkïf|zofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofadhïfthïf|zofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfjïf|zofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfshïf|zofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:zofadhïfkïf|zofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zofadhæthæ|zofadhæthæ]] || [[word:zofadhæjæ|zofadhæjæ]] || [[word:zofadhæshæ|zofadhæshæ]] || [[word:zofadhækæ|zofadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zofadhathatha|zofadhathatha]] || [[word:zofadhajaja|zofadhajaja]] || [[word:zofadhashasha|zofadhashasha]] || [[word:zofadhakaka|zofadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zofadhatha|zofadhatha]] || [[word:zofadhaja|zofadhaja]] || [[word:zofadhasha|zofadhasha]] || [[word:zofadhaka|zofadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zofadhafthaf|zofadhafthaf]] || [[word:zofadhafjaf|zofadhafjaf]] || [[word:zofadhafshaf|zofadhafshaf]] || [[word:zofadhafkaf|zofadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zofadhasha|zofadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zofadhshësha|zofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zofadhrosha|zofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zofadhmusha|zofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zofadhyasha|zofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozofadhnkshësha|gozofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozofadhnkrosha|gozofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozofadhnkmusha|gozofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozofadhnkyasha|gozofadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zofafadhasha|zofafadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zofafadhshësha|zofafadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zofafadhrosha|zofafadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zofafadhmusha|zofafadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zofafadhyasha|zofafadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozofafadhnkshësha|gozofafadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozofafadhnkrosha|gozofafadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozofafadhnkmusha|gozofafadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozofafadhnkyasha|gozofafadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zefædhasha|zefædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zefædhshësha|zefædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zefædhrosha|zefædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zefædhmusha|zefædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zefædhyasha|zefædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozefædhnkshësha|gozefædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozefædhnkrosha|gozefædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozefædhnkmusha|gozefædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozefædhnkyasha|gozefædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zofadhasha|zofadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zofadhshësha|zofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zofadhrosha|zofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zofadhmusha|zofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zofadhyasha|zofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozofadhnkshësha|gozofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozofadhnkrosha|gozofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozofadhnkmusha|gozofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozofadhnkyasha|gozofadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
